title: Tamil Nadu CM oath ceremony LIVE: Vijay receives Guard of Honour, takes charge as CM at Tamil Nadu Secretariat
description: Tamil Nadu oath ceremony LIVE: C Joseph Vijay took oath as the chief minister of Tamil Nadu. Among those present at the swearing-in ceremony were Rahul Gandhi, Vijay’s parents SA Chandrasekhar and Shoba Chandrasekhar, and several personalities from the Tamil film industry.
